features.title: Ship features from anywhere
features.description: The entire development pipeline — design, code, and deploy — runs through an AI-powered workflow. New features can be built and shipped from any device, any time.

features.title: Smarter keyboard colours
features.description: Keys now show every colour they've earned across your guesses — no more single-colour surprises.

features.title: Keyboard toggle
features.description: Prefer typing? Head to Settings to hide the on-screen keyboard.

features.title: Score history table
features.description: All Time scores now has a day-by-day breakdown. Toggle between Guesses and Points to see who showed up.

features.title: Row winners highlighted
features.description: The best score in each history row glows green. Who's been the sharpest, day by day?
